description: Proposed building a local speaker-aliases.json file to map Plaud speaker labels to real names. Plaud already has built-in speaker identification — adding speakers to Plaud's system updates transcripts automatically. Jarvis reinvented a wheel that already exists upstream.
correction: Speaker tagging should be done in Plaud's own system, not maintained locally. The skill should focus on getting speakers registered in Plaud so transcripts arrive pre-tagged.
systemic_fix: Before proposing local solutions for third-party tool gaps, check whether the tool already solves it. Prefer upstream fixes over local workarounds.
